# Comprehensive miRNA Periodontal Disease Analysis Results
**Date:** July 16, 2025  
**Dataset:** miRNA-saliva-qPCR-results.csv  
**Groups:** S=Healthy, G=Gingivitis, P=Periodontitis  

## 1. Demographic & Clinical Characteristics
| Group   |   N |   Age_Mean |   Age_Std |   Sex_M_Count |   Sex_F_Count |   Sex_M_Percent |   plaque_index_Mean |   plaque_index_Std |   gingival_index_Mean |   gingival_index_Std |   pocket_depth_Mean |   pocket_depth_Std |   bleeding_on_probing_Mean |   bleeding_on_probing_Std |   number_of_missing_teeth_Mean |   number_of_missing_teeth_Std |
|:--------|----:|-----------:|----------:|--------------:|--------------:|----------------:|--------------------:|-------------------:|----------------------:|---------------------:|--------------------:|-------------------:|---------------------------:|--------------------------:|-------------------------------:|------------------------------:|
| S       |  36 |    24.3056 |   3.70189 |            17 |            19 |         47.2222 |            0.440556 |           0.240962 |              0.500556 |             0.238087 |             1.97722 |           0.207    |                    5.78194 |                   3.06727 |                       0.388889 |                      1.04957  |
| G       |  36 |    22.4444 |   1.6978  |            16 |            20 |         44.4444 |            1.075    |           0.539426 |              1.21167  |             0.404252 |             2.21111 |           0.316803 |                   25.0122  |                  13.5831  |                       0.444444 |                      0.969372 |
| P       |  36 |    30.2778 |   5.78476 |            18 |            18 |         50      |            1.73944  |           0.512344 |              1.67222  |             0.406245 |             3.91889 |           0.684701 |                   64.3469  |                  18.7558  |                       1.11111  |                      1.03586  |

## 2. ΔΔCt Transformation & QC
### Calibrator Values (Healthy Group Mean ΔCt)
| miRNA   |   Calibrator_Value |
|:--------|-------------------:|
| mir146a |           0.435278 |
| mir146b |           0.491111 |
| mir155  |           0.445    |
| mir203  |           0.935    |
| mir223  |           0.930278 |
| mir381p |           0.955556 |

## 3. Differential Expression Analysis
### Volcano Plots
![Volcano Plots](data:image/png;base64,)

### Significant Differential Expression Results (FDR < 0.05 & |Log2FC| > 1)
| miRNA   | Comparison   |   Log2_FC |   Q_Value |   Effect_Size |
|:--------|:-------------|----------:|----------:|--------------:|
| mir203  | H_vs_P       |    -1.590 |     0.000 |        -1.926 |
| mir155  | H_vs_P       |    -1.272 |     0.000 |        -2.286 |
| mir223  | H_vs_P       |    -1.611 |     0.000 |        -1.827 |
| mir381p | H_vs_P       |    -1.890 |     0.000 |        -2.044 |
| mir146a | H_vs_P       |    -1.075 |     0.000 |        -1.562 |
| mir203  | G_vs_P       |    -1.307 |     0.000 |        -0.921 |
| mir223  | G_vs_P       |    -1.507 |     0.000 |        -1.030 |
| mir381p | G_vs_P       |    -1.630 |     0.000 |        -1.053 |

## 4. Machine Learning Performance
| Problem                     | Model               |   AUC |   Accuracy |
|:----------------------------|:--------------------|------:|-----------:|
| Healthy_vs_Periodontitis    | Logistic_Regression | 1.000 |      1.000 |
| Healthy_vs_Periodontitis    | Random_Forest       | 1.000 |      1.000 |
| Healthy_vs_Gingivitis       | Logistic_Regression | 1.000 |      1.000 |
| Healthy_vs_Gingivitis       | Random_Forest       | 1.000 |      1.000 |
| Gingivitis_vs_Periodontitis | Logistic_Regression | 1.000 |      0.933 |
| Gingivitis_vs_Periodontitis | Random_Forest       | 1.000 |      1.000 |
### ROC Curves
![ROC Curves](data:image/png;base64,)


## 5. Dimensionality Reduction Analysis
![Dimensionality Reduction Plots](data:image/png;base64,)


## 6. Recommendations
- Validate findings with a larger, independent patient cohort.
- Investigate the functional roles of mir-203, mir-223, and mir-381p in periodontitis progression using in-vitro studies.
- Explore the combined diagnostic potential of miRNA signatures and clinical markers in a longitudinal study to predict disease progression.
